title: Cocktails in the Kitchen
writer: J. Lee Thompson, Peter Myers, Alec Grahame
actors: Dirk Bogarde, Susan Stephen, Cecil Parker
plot: In postwar London, young graduate Tony (Sir Dirk Bogarde) and his girlfriend Anne (Susan Stephen) decide to marry. Her well-to-do parents are not convinced, but they agree once he has got a £5.10.0 job and a 30/- a week single-roo...
